## Validation

- [ ] Added or updated focused tests where behavior changed
- [ ] Ran the narrowest relevant test command
- [ ] Ran `bun run lint:ci`
- [ ] Ran `bun run typecheck`
- [ ] Recorded any opt-in Docker, SSH, DNS, TLS, or provider smoke and cleanup

## Contract And Documentation

- [ ] No user-visible contract changed
- [ ] Governing ADR/spec/workflow/test matrix is updated when required
- [ ] Operation catalog, CLI/API/Web/MCP surfaces remain aligned
- [ ] Public documentation and translations are updated when required
- [ ] Provider-specific behavior stays behind a declared capability or extension point

## Safety

- [ ] No secrets, credentials, private endpoints, customer data, or hosted commercial policy are included
- [ ] Failure, retry, rollback, cleanup, and external-resource impact are described where relevant
